song.title: Nevermore this World Shall Bind Me
song.author: Peter Wang
song.lyrics: [V1] .G Bm Am-C Nevermore this world shall bind me . Em D I won’t let it tie me up . C G Nor let it weigh me down . Bm Am-C Although Pharaoh’s force surrounds me . Em D C-G I am free from fear and doubt [C] . C G Here I am, standing on Mount Zion high . C D Far above the storms . B Em Where I hear the heavenly Father’s cry . C Hear Him, this is My Beloved, . D My Beloved for you He died!|| .G B Em-C His Word, my strength, my stay, my life .G B Em I’ll live, I’ll die, I’ll fight .C G And on I’ll go .C G Wherever He goes [V2] More and more this living water Gushes forth from deep within And flows out to the end There’s a table spread before me All-inclusive Christ my land.
